Where is the documentation issue? (Provide a link if possible)

- Section:

## 🐛 Problem

Describe what is wrong, missing, or unclear in the documentation.

## 💡 Suggested Improvement

How could the documentation be improved?

## 📝 Proposed Changes

If you know what changes should be made, describe them here or provide the corrected text.

Proposed documentation text here

## 🎯 Audience

Who is affected by this documentation issue?

- [ ] New users trying to get started
- [ ] Developers contributing to the project
- [ ] API consumers
- [ ] System administrators deploying the application
- [ ] Other: **\_**

## 🔗 Related Issues

Are there any related issues or pull requests?

## 📚 Additional Context

Add any other context about the documentation issue here.

## ✔️ Checklist

- [ ] I have checked that this documentation issue hasn't been reported already
- [ ] I have clearly described the problem
- [ ] I have provided suggestions for improvement
